requirements.desc: report.js shall read test summary from state.test?.summary instead of state.metrics?.test?.summary
requirements.note: src/flow/commands/report.js was changed from state.metrics?.test?.summary to state.test?.summary.

requirements.desc: After flow set test-summary, report shall display correct unit/integration/acceptance/total values
requirements.note: Added tests verify report output for unit=3, integration=2, acceptance=1, total=6 when state.test.summary is populated, but no direct end-to-end test invoking flow set test-summary command is included in the diff.

unplanned.change: New spec process draft document added (project/process artifact, not a runtime requirement).
New workflow tracking metadata added, including step status/metrics/notes.
New spec-level test file added (verification support, not explicitly a product requirement).

summary.notes: Core functional fix for report summary path is implemented. Display behavior is strongly supported by report-level tests, but strict command-to-report end-to-end proof via actual flow set execution is not shown in this diff.
